ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Engineers India Limited has appointed Shri Atul Gupta, previously Director (Commercial), as its new permanent Chairman & Managing Director, transitioning from an interim head. This key leadership change, effective June 29, 2026, brings stability to the company's top management with an experienced internal candidate. There are no apparent red flags, as the appointment adheres to regulatory disclosures and Shri Gupta has a strong 30-year track record within the company.
